# CalculateIt

> Free, instant, and accurate vehicle, insurance, and title fee calculators for all 50 US states.

## Pages

- [Home](/index.html): Overview of CalculateIt's vehicle and title fee calculators.
- [Vehicle Calculators](/vehicles.html): 50-state vehicle tax, title, and registration fee calculators.
- [About](/about.html): The vision behind CalculateIt and founder Chetan Kumar.
- [Contact](/contact.html): Get in touch with the CalculateIt team.

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy.html)
